title: Sujata
overview: Sujata (Nutan) is adopted by the Upedendranath and Charu Chowdhury and grows up along side their daughter Rama.  Adhir (Sunil Dutt) enters the Chowdhury family and is considered a suitor for Rama.  However, Adhir likes Sujata and intends to marry her but Sujata's past becomes an point of contention.  Adhir's family will not accept a lower-case girl as their daughter-in-law.  The movie beautifully portrays the prevalent caste system in Indian society.
